title: ASA® Measuring Jug 250ml Glass Measuring Jug Heavy Duty Made with 100% Non-Toxic Clear Glass Water Jugs Stackable Dishwasher Microwave Safe
features: Heat-Resistant Borosilicate Glass – Made from premium borosilicate glass, ensuring exceptional resistance to thermal shock, preventing cracks or shattering during extreme temperature changes.
Precise Measurement Markings – Features clear red metric and imperial markings, including milliliters, pints, quarts, and fluid ounces, for accurate measuring of liquids.
Freezer, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe – Designed for convenience, this jug is safe for use in the microwave, dishwasher, and freezer, making it an essential kitchen tool.
Easy-Pour Spout Design – The carefully crafted spout allows for controlled, mess-free pouring, preventing spills and ensuring precise liquid transfer.
Comfortable & Secure Grip – A sturdy handle provides a firm and comfortable grip, ensuring safe handling even when the jug is full.
description: Product Description Classic Glass Measuring Jug – A Kitchen Essential for Precision & Convenience The Classic Glass Measuring Jug (250ml/0.25L) is a must-have for every kitchen, combining durability, accuracy, and versatility. Made from high-quality borosilicate glass , this jug is designed to withstand thermal shock , ensuring safe use with hot or cold liquids. Whether you're heating ingredients in the microwave, storing liquids in the freezer, or measuring with precision , this jug delivers unmatched reliability. Featuring clear and easy-to-read metric and imperial markings , you can effortlessly measure in milliliters, fluid ounces, quarts, and pints for accurate cooking and baking. The carefully designed spout allows for controlled, mess-free pouring , preventing drips and spills while transferring liquids. Beyond measuring, this jug serves as a multi-functional kitchen tool – perfect for melting butter or chocolate, mixing ingredients, or even serving beverages . The sturdy handle provides a comfortable and secure grip , ensuring safe and easy handling even when the jug is full. Designed for maximum convenience , this freezer, dishwasher, and microwave-safe measuring jug simplifies your cooking experience. Its compact 0.25L size makes it ideal for measuring smaller quantities while taking up minimal storage space in your kitchen. Backed by a trusted brand with a legacy of quality kitchenware , this heat-resistant and hygienic measuring jug is built to last. Whether you're an experienced chef or a home cook, this jug is the perfect companion for all your cooking, baking, and measuring needs .
